ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XS, S, M, L, XL) */,
  "chest" INTEGER /* Chest measurement in millimeters */,
  "shoulder" INTEGER /* Shoulder measurement in millimeters */,
  "front_length" INTEGER /* Front length measurement in millimeters */,
  "back_length" INTEGER /* Back length measurement in millimeters */,
  "waist" INTEGER /* Waist measurement in millimeters */,
  "hip" INTEGER /* Hip measurement in millimeters */,
  "sleeve_length" INTEGER /* Sleeve length measurement in millimeters */,
  "inseam" INTEGER /* Inseam measurement in millimeters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock Keeping Unit number */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product in grams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the brand */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a parent category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "warehouses" (
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each warehouse */,
  "warehouse_name" TEXT /* Name of the warehouse */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the warehouse */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the warehouse */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total storage capacity of the warehouse */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the warehouse */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_warehouses_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "restock_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity for restocking */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the warehouse */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "total_price" TEXT /* Total price of the sale after discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_warehouse_id FOREIGN KEY ("warehouse_id") REFERENCES warehouses ("warehouse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Store's opening hours */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, employee, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

Reference to the brand of the product
Reference to the category of the product
Weight of the product in grams
Contact phone number for the brand
Total storage capacity of the warehouse
Reference to the manager of the warehouse
